requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — COSQC Conformity Inspection and IEC 62619 as International Baseline for Iraq BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——COSQC合格评定检验及IEC 62619作为伊拉克BESS项目验收的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——COSQC合格評定檢驗及IEC 62619作為伊拉克BESS項目驗收的國際基準

summary.en: COSQC (Central Organization for Standardization and Quality Control, cosqc.gov.iq) is Iraq's national standards body and conformity assessment authority. COSQC issues Iraqi Standards (IQS), operates a pre-shipment conformity inspection regime for imported products, and can require conformity certificates as a condition of customs clearance. COSQC conformity inspection is a key practical gate for BESS imports to Iraq; the applicable IQS for BESS cells and systems should be verified directly with COSQC before shipment. Where COSQC has not issued a specific IQS for stationary BESS, COSQC typically references IEC standards. IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules, and Iraq project owners, international EPCs, and project lenders active in Iraq's solar and storage tender pipeline (TotalEnergies, PowerChina, Masdar projects) reference IEC 62619 compliance as a technical prerequisite. IEC 62133 (battery safety for portable applications) is sometimes referenced for smaller battery systems. IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems) is the system-level safety reference. Exporters should verify the current COSQC conformity inspection scope and any applicable IQS directly with COSQC before shipment.
summary.zh: COSQC（标准化和质量控制中央组织，cosqc.gov.iq）是伊拉克国家标准机构和合格评定机关。COSQC发布伊拉克标准（IQS），对进口产品实施装运前合格评定检验，并可要求合格证书作为海关清关条件。COSQC合格评定检验是BESS进口伊拉克的关键实际门槛；BESS电芯和系统适用的IQS应在出货前直接向COSQC核实。在COSQC未针对固定式BESS发布具体IQS的情况下，COSQC通常引用IEC标准。IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准，在伊拉克太阳能和储能招标管线中活跃的项目业主、国际EPC承包商及项目贷款方（道达尔能源、PowerChina、Masdar项目）将IEC 62619合规作为技术前提。IEC 62133（便携式应用电池安全）有时被较小型电池系统引用。IEC 62933-5-2（电化学系统安全要求）是系统级安全参考依据。出口商在出货前应直接向COSQC核实现行合格评定检验范围及任何适用IQS。
summary.zht: COSQC（標準化和質量控制中央組織，cosqc.gov.iq）是伊拉克國家標準機構和合格評定機關。COSQC發布伊拉克標準（IQS），對進口產品實施裝運前合格評定檢驗，並可要求合格證書作為海關清關條件。COSQC合格評定檢驗是BESS進口伊拉克的關鍵實際門檻；BESS電芯和系統適用的IQS應在出貨前直接向COSQC核實。在COSQC未針對固定式BESS發布具體IQS的情況下，COSQC通常引用IEC標準。IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準，在伊拉克太陽能和儲能招標管線中活躍的項目業主、國際EPC承包商及項目貸款方（道達爾能源、PowerChina、Masdar項目）將IEC 62619合規作為技術前提。IEC 62133（便攜式應用電池安全）有時被較小型電池系統引用。IEC 62933-5-2（電化學系統安全要求）是系統級安全參考依據。出口商在出貨前應直接向COSQC核實現行合格評定檢驗範圍及任何適用IQS。

standards_or_laws: COSQC — Central Organization for Standardization and Quality Control (Iraq national standards body and conformity assessment authority; pre-shipment inspection regime; website: cosqc.gov.iq)

IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Iraq project specifications)
IEC 62619:2017 — predecessor edition; confirm which edition is referenced in the applicable project specification
IEC 62133-2:2017 — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries (sometimes referenced for smaller battery systems)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level safety reference expected in project-lender specifications)

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in COSQC conformity inspection or Iraq project specifications. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance, and must confirm with COSQC whether a conformity certificate is required before shipment.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准不被COSQC合格评定检验或伊拉克项目规格接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据，并须向COSQC确认出货前是否需要合格证书。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準不被COSQC合格評定檢驗或伊拉克項目規格接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據，並須向COSQC確認出貨前是否需要合格證書。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: COSQC conformity inspection is a pre-shipment gate for BESS imports to Iraq; Iraq project owners, EPCs, and lenders reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in COSQC inspection or project technical specifications. Exporters should: (a) contact COSQC directly (cosqc.gov.iq) to confirm whether a pre-shipment conformity inspection certificate is required for BESS cells or systems and which IQS or IEC standards apply; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Iraq BESS projects; (c) obtain IEC 62933-5-2 system-level safety evidence where required by project lenders; (d) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification before committing to a test programme.
gap.zh: 关键差距：COSQC合格评定检验是BESS进口伊拉克的装运前门槛；伊拉克项目业主、EPC承包商和贷款方将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被COSQC检验或项目技术规格接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）直接联系COSQC（cosqc.gov.iq），确认BESS电芯或系统是否需要装运前合格评定检验证书，以及适用哪些IQS或IEC标准；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至伊拉克BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）在项目贷款方要求时取得IEC 62933-5-2系统级安全证据；（d）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格中引用的IEC 62619版本。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：COSQC合格評定檢驗是BESS進口伊拉克的裝運前門檻；伊拉克項目業主、EPC承包商和貸款方將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被COSQC檢驗或項目技術規格接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）直接聯繫COSQC（cosqc.gov.iq），確認BESS電芯或系統是否需要裝運前合格評定檢驗證書，以及適用哪些IQS或IEC標準；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至伊拉克BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）在項目貸款方要求時取得IEC 62933-5-2系統級安全證據；（d）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格中引用的IEC 62619版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where project lenders or MoE specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; COSQC pre-shipment conformity inspection requirement for BESS — verify current scope directly with COSQC (cosqc.gov.iq)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

source.publisher: COSQC — Central Organization for Standardization and Quality Control (Iraq)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] COSQC conformity inspection is a pre-shipment gate for BESS imports to Iraq; IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Iraq project specifications and project-lender requirements. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for COSQC inspection or Iraq project acceptance. Verify COSQC current conformity inspection scope for BESS (cosqc.gov.iq) and confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner, MoE, and any appointed conformity assessment body before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] COSQC合格评定检验是BESS进口伊拉克的装运前门槛；IEC 62619是伊拉克项目规格和项目贷款方要求中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足COSQC检验或伊拉克项目验收要求。出货前请向COSQC核实BESS现行合格评定检验范围（cosqc.gov.iq），并向项目业主、MoE及任何指定合格评定机构确认IEC 62619证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] COSQC合格評定檢驗是BESS進口伊拉克的裝運前門檻；IEC 62619是伊拉克項目規格和項目貸款方要求中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足COSQC檢驗或伊拉克項目驗收要求。出貨前請向COSQC核實BESS現行合格評定檢驗範圍（cosqc.gov.iq），並向項目業主、MoE及任何指定合格評定機構確認IEC 62619證據要求。
